title: White Rubber Latex Makeup Blenders, Pack of 8 (5.2 cm) - Gentle on Skin, Ideal for Various Makeup Applications
features: VERSATILE MAKEUP APPLICATION: This set includes 8 white makeup blenders, each measuring 5.2 cm, perfect for precise and seamless application of foundation, concealer, and contour products.
PREMIUM QUALITY MATERIAL: Crafted from natural rubber latex, these sponges are designed to deliver a smooth, skin-like texture for consistent coverage and a flawless complexion.
SOFT & GENTLE ON SKIN: The soft and plush material of our makeup sponges provides a gentle touch on the skin, making them suitable for all skin types.
MULTI-PURPOSE USE: From everyday makeup to special occasion looks, these blenders are ideal for creating a variety of makeup styles and achieving a professional finish.
REUSABLE & EASY TO CLEAN: Our blenders are designed for repeated use, making them an eco-friendly and cost-effective choice. They are also easy to clean with just a bit of soap and water.
description: Product Description This make up blender is ideal for a wide range of uses, including skin cleansing and removing make-up. Indications Make up Safety Warning No warning applicable See more
